item.description:
## What's Changed
- Remove remaining Osaurus invite copy from Sentra UI (#466) by @aidenmi8 - Remove Osaurus storage copy from Sentra UI (#464) by @aidenmi8 - Gate expensive GitHub Actions by explicit opt-in (#465) by @aidenmi8 - Selective Osaurus UI intake for Zion (#463) by @aidenmi8 - Prepare Sentra 1.3.5 release (#458) by @aidenmi8 - Stabilize clawpatch full gate (#457) by @aidenmi8 - Register pairing approval shortcuts (#456) by @aidenmi8 - Cover bundle command routing (#455) by @aidenmi8 - Persist speech model fallback selection (#454) by @aidenmi8 - Cover evals CLI argument contracts (#453) by @aidenmi8 - Restore empty clipboard after paste (#452) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve skill enabled state on create (#451) by @aidenmi8 - Exercise app unit tests in shared scheme (#450) by @aidenmi8 - Clarify model download margin boundary (#449) by @aidenmi8 - Suppress What's New auto-show on downgrades (#448) by @aidenmi8 - Tighten duplicate read optimization test (#447) by @aidenmi8 - Reject file collisions in ensureExists (#446) by @aidenmi8 - Respect exclusion path boundaries in fingerprints (#445) by @aidenmi8 - Cover CLI parsing and dispatch (#444) by @aidenmi8 - Require fast tool success payload assertion (#443) by @aidenmi8 - Respect home path boundaries in watcher display (#442) by @aidenmi8 - Report host workspace cleanup failures (#441) by @aidenmi8 - Fail inline artifacts on write errors (#440) by @aidenmi8 - Validate custom provider onboarding ports (#439) by @aidenmi8 - Keep unknown model sizes last when sorting (#438) by @aidenmi8 - Assert management audit UI before launch screenshot (#437) by @aidenmi8 - Exercise MetalGate concurrent embedding entries (#436) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve max completion tokens on model rewrite (#435) by @aidenmi8 - Strengthen router models endpoint test (#434) by @aidenmi8 - Guard theme toast dismissal (#433) by @aidenmi8 - Guard watcher success toast dismissal (#432) by @aidenmi8 - Add pairing deep link router coverage (#431) by @aidenmi8 - Flush remote agent note autosave on disappear (#430) by @aidenmi8 - Escape plugin error JSON bodies (#429) by @aidenmi8 - Validate identity request signing URLs (#428) by @aidenmi8 - Detect missed recurring schedule runs (#427) by @aidenmi8 - Report schedule batch save failures (#426) by @aidenmi8 - Await networking test server cleanup (#425) by @aidenmi8 - Assert UI audit launch readiness (#424) by @aidenmi8 - Surface usage SQLite step failures (#423) by @aidenmi8 - Balance directory picker security scope access (#422) by @aidenmi8 - Use deterministic manifest dylib fixture (#421) by @aidenmi8 - Cover compact tool index output (#420) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve unrelated document registry entries in unregister test (#419) by @aidenmi8 - Tighten Vectura negative-path tests (#418) by @aidenmi8 - Keep onboarding welcome reveal monotonic (#417) by @aidenmi8 - Tokenize text similarity on word boundaries (#416) by @aidenmi8 - Replace existing ZIP on skill export (#415) by @aidenmi8 - Observe agent manager in app menus (#414) by @aidenmi8 - Cover multimodal video in all-roles mapping test (#413) by @aidenmi8 - Expose argument coercion expectations init (#412) by @aidenmi8 - Disable audit anchor hit testing (#411) by @aidenmi8 - Encode sandbox plugin booleans as strings (#410) by @aidenmi8 - Normalize voice configuration ranges (#409) by @aidenmi8 - Apply custom theme gradient angles (#408) by @aidenmi8 - Serialize debug log appends (#407) by @aidenmi8 - Refresh expanded tool arguments on update (#406) by @aidenmi8 - Use service clock for usage exports (#405) by @aidenmi8 - Allow onboarding height preference to shrink (#404) by @aidenmi8 - Clean up hotkey recorder monitors on dismantle (#403) by @aidenmi8 - Strengthen incremental save baseline test (#402) by @aidenmi8 - Stabilize inference progress tests (#401) by @aidenmi8 - Recognize full IPv4 loopback range (#400) by @aidenmi8 - Clarify launch audit test names (#399) by @aidenmi8 - Limit persisted memory text values (#398) by @aidenmi8 - Clamp MethodScore counters (#397) by @aidenmi8 - Prove ModelLease waiters block in tests (#396) by @aidenmi8 - Serialize native plugin reload tests (#395) by @aidenmi8 - Fail closed on OAuth state random failures (#394) by @aidenmi8 - Keep disabled skills out of search index (#393) by @aidenmi8 - Handle empty Whats New releases (#392) by @aidenmi8 - Avoid plugin loading for pure eval suites (#391) by @aidenmi8 - Stabilize schedule card identity colors (#390) by @aidenmi8 - Check Xcode workspace metadata permissions (#389) by @aidenmi8 - Clean up status audit test windows (#388) by @aidenmi8 - Label shared toggle row switches (#387) by @aidenmi8 - Serialize TTFT trace file appends (#386) by @aidenmi8 - Isolate uninitialized memory search tests (#385) by @aidenmi8 - Require decoding errors for unknown tool choices (#384) by @aidenmi8 - Fallback blank artifact filenames to path basename (#383) by @aidenmi8 - Strip YAML inline comments from method references (#382) by @aidenmi8 - Fail stale repository branch refreshes (#381) by @aidenmi8 - Use distribution signing for release archives (#380) by @aidenmi8 - Pass through empty toast overlay hits (#379) by @aidenmi8 - Full redraw chart spec changes (#378) by @aidenmi8 - Exercise generation default resolution through adapter (#377) by @aidenmi8 - Isolate capability load buffer test (#376) by @aidenmi8 - Retain transcription test field text (#375) by @aidenmi8 - Resolve capability group toggles from source buckets (#374) by @aidenmi8 - Invalidate stale model picker rows (#373) by @aidenmi8 - Wait for async system permission decisions (#372) by @aidenmi8 - Fix synchronous remote model aggregation (#371) by @aidenmi8 - Return core model timeouts without waiting for cancellation (#370) by @aidenmi8 - Return tool timeouts without waiting for cancellation (#369) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve required tool choice semantics (#368) by @aidenmi8 - Backfill skill search index on initialization (#367) by @aidenmi8 - Discover tools from loaded MCP bundles (#366) by @aidenmi8 - Make transcription cancel discard captured text (#365) by @aidenmi8 - Invalidate stale MCP provider connects (#364) by @aidenmi8 - Add initialized method search regression tests (#363) by @aidenmi8 - Serialize MLX error handler installation (#362) by @aidenmi8 - Verify preflight fallback model routing (#361) by @aidenmi8 - Surface sandbox resource reset failures (#360) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve skill metadata when editing (#359) by @aidenmi8 - Keep latest dev dylib for asset reloads (#358) by @aidenmi8 - Narrow Nemotron thinking profile matching (#357) by @aidenmi8 - Keep memory transcript tests time-relative (#356) by @aidenmi8 - Inspect top-level ok in tool envelopes (#355) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve first user task during context trimming (#354) by @aidenmi8 - Gate memory write success toasts on persistence (#353) by @aidenmi8 - Count episode memories in agent memory list (#352) by @aidenmi8 - Fill preflight ranking from allowed catalog (#351) by @aidenmi8 - Spill appendTurn attachments before persistence (#350) by @aidenmi8 - Scope ModelManager background fetch suppression in tests (#349) by @aidenmi8 - Ignore stale remote model search completions (#348) by @aidenmi8 - Deny overlapping tool approval prompts (#347) by @aidenmi8 - Deny overlapping pairing prompts (#346) by @aidenmi8 - Fix background task completion multi-awaiters (#345) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve newer memory config cache writes (#344) by @aidenmi8 - Serialize VAD start and menu toggles (#343) by @aidenmi8 - Observe schedule and watcher menu state (#342) by @aidenmi8 - Avoid self-cancelling usage refresh tasks (#341) by @aidenmi8 - Prevent duplicate manual schedule runs (#340) by @aidenmi8 - Validate persisted schedule frequencies (#339) by @aidenmi8 - Use semantic ordering for tools upgrade (#338) by @aidenmi8 - Fix prerelease SemVer ordering (#337) by @aidenmi8 - Normalize stored theme metadata ids (#336) by @aidenmi8 - Sync chat window session index (#335) by @aidenmi8 - Observe slash command registry changes (#334) by @aidenmi8 - Strengthen SQLCipher guard tests (#333) by @aidenmi8 - Wire folder undo root lifecycle (#332) by @aidenmi8 - Fix FlowLayout intrinsic width (#331) by @aidenmi8 - Show retry state for identity unlock failures (#330) by @aidenmi8 - Collect media blob refs on session delete (#329) by @aidenmi8 - Assert ModelRuntime actor isolation (#328) by @aidenmi8 - Test document parser at size cap (#327) by @aidenmi8 - Reject non-positive cron steps (#326) by @aidenmi8 - Fix empty custom wake phrase matching (#325) by @aidenmi8 - Cancel model download tasks promptly (#324) by @aidenmi8 - Await sandbox integration cleanup (#323) by @aidenmi8 - Honor plugin minimum host versions (#322) by @aidenmi8 - Strengthen usage export assertions (#321) by @aidenmi8 - Serialize identity counter allocation (#320) by @aidenmi8 - Stabilize agent todo item IDs (#319) by @aidenmi8 - Stabilize content block identity (#318) by @aidenmi8 - Surface CLI NDJSON stream errors (#317) by @aidenmi8 - Fix acknowledgements generator root discovery (#316) by @aidenmi8 - Guard Rust scaffold host API logging (#315) by @aidenmi8 - Fix tokenizer tool spec byte stability (#314) by @aidenmi8 - Tighten access key rejection assertions (#313) by @aidenmi8 - Block plugin HTTP hostnames resolving private (#312) by @aidenmi8 - Cover sandbox artifact source containment (#311) by @aidenmi8 - Restore chat sandbox test globals on failure (#310) by @aidenmi8 - Restore MCP tool configuration override in tests (#309) by @aidenmi8 - Register sandbox plugin tools after editor saves (#308) by @aidenmi8 - Serialize sandbox registry test mutations (#307) by @aidenmi8 - Avoid document registry callbacks while locked (#306) by @aidenmi8 - Reject stale onboarding provider test results (#305) by @aidenmi8 - Serialize repository global-state tests (#304) by @aidenmi8 - Harden skill temp root restoration (#303) by @aidenmi8 - Stop VAD test stream before restart (#302) by @aidenmi8 - Fix MCP used server parsing (#301) by @aidenmi8 - Fix CLI config legacy port fallback (#300) by @aidenmi8 - Use stored provider secrets in edit tests (#299) by @aidenmi8 - Allow clearing plugin config secrets (#298) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve provider image content parts (#297) by @aidenmi8 - Reject invalid cron schedule saves (#296) by @aidenmi8 - Round-trip toast URL actions (#295) by @aidenmi8 - Preflight chat attachment sizes (#294) by @aidenmi8 - Honor earliest Foundation stop sequence (#293) by @aidenmi8 - Serialize tool error envelopes safely (#292) by @aidenmi8 - Keep eval model overrides in memory (#291) by @aidenmi8 - Let bundle load cleanup run on interrupt (#290) by @aidenmi8 - Retain failed file undo operations (#289) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve agent behavior when duplicating (#288) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve watcher parameters on edit (#287) by @aidenmi8 - Keep built-in slash commands out of user store (#286) by @aidenmi8 - Prune agent memory vectors with SQL rows (#285) by @aidenmi8 - Report clear memory deletion failures (#284) by @aidenmi8 - Clear stale clipboard text on unsupported selection (#283) by @aidenmi8 - Hide mutable trusted spec roots from production API (#282) by @aidenmi8 - Scope pending memory signals by agent (#281) by @aidenmi8 - Fail eval CLI when report output cannot be written (#280) by @aidenmi8 - Reject invalid sandbox plugin metadata saves (#279) by @aidenmi8 - Make sandbox agent map mutations atomic (#278) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve OAuth refresh tokens on keychain save failure (#277) by @aidenmi8 - Surface sandbox plugin library persistence failures (#276) by @aidenmi8 - Use security-scoped access for theme imports (#275) by @aidenmi8 - Surface theme save failures (#274) by @aidenmi8 - Skip metadata-only chat recovery (#273) by @aidenmi8 - Replace pulled model files safely (#272) by @aidenmi8 - Surface watcher save failures (#271) by @aidenmi8 - Constrain tools uninstall path removal (#270) by @aidenmi8 - Fail tools verify on missing artifacts (#269) by @aidenmi8 - Fail closed on invite nonce random failures (#268) by @aidenmi8 - Fail closed on identity random failures (#267) by @aidenmi8 - Block unsafe markdown image sources (#266) by @aidenmi8 - Keep secret prompt open on save failure (#265) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve MCP keychain secrets on save failure (#264) by @aidenmi8 - Cover plugin secret deletion scope (#263) by @aidenmi8 - Balance watcher bookmark security scopes (#262) by @aidenmi8 - Harden memory vector agent buckets (#261) by @aidenmi8 - Harden artifact markdown link boundaries (#260) by @aidenmi8 - Fail security-state mutations when persistence fails (#259) by @aidenmi8 - Stabilize relay host auth tests (#258) by @aidenmi8 - Authenticate forged relay host plugin context (#257) by @aidenmi8 - Omit secret provider headers from config JSON (#256) by @aidenmi8 - Contain skill file operations (#255) by @aidenmi8 - Validate pull remote file paths (#254) by @aidenmi8 - Reject sandbox plugin id path escapes (#253) by @aidenmi8 - Reject sandbox sibling-prefix paths (#252) by @aidenmi8 - Recheck plugin HTTP redirects for SSRF (#251) by @aidenmi8 - Reject folder-tool symlink escapes (#250) by @aidenmi8 - Fail partial storage migration without stamping (#249) by @aidenmi8 - [codex] Integrate Sentra upstream intake with clawpatch queue (#248) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve legacy custom themes during decode (#240) by @aidenmi8 - Fix plugin secret account collisions (#235) by @aidenmi8 - Require auth for distributed control notifications (#247) by @aidenmi8 - Fix plugin shutdown task-event queue race (#246) by @aidenmi8 - Keep manifest host API alive for v2 plugins (#245) by @aidenmi8 - Require confirmation before sandbox security reset (#244) by @aidenmi8 - Harden sandbox plugin install shell handling (#243) by @aidenmi8 - Quote sandbox install package arguments safely (#242) by @aidenmi8 - Fail closed when storage migration is not ready (#241) by @aidenmi8 - Fail storage key rotation on osec rewrap errors (#239) by @aidenmi8 - Bind agent invite signatures to relay metadata (#238) by @aidenmi8 - Require focus for tool prompt shortcuts (#237) by @aidenmi8 - Preserve master key on replacement failure (#236) by @aidenmi8 - Fix storage key first-run race (#234) by @aidenmi8 - Fix MCP disabled tool invocation (#233) by @aidenmi8 - Fix plugin trust and multi-agent relay registration (#5) by @aidenmi8 - [codex] Restore legacy chat history and harden sandbox quit (#4) by @aidenmi8 - [codex] Preserve chat history across updates (#2) by @aidenmi8 - [codex] Refresh Sentra identity assets (#1) by @aidenmi8
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aidenmi8/zion/compare/...0.1.0

# Sentra 1.3.6
## Remote Providers And Tool Calls
- Preserves pasted provider base paths when endpoint URLs end in `/models`, `/chat/completions`, `/responses`, or `/messages`. - Repairs remote Anthropic, router, and Gemini tool-result payloads by merging duplicate adjacent same-id tool results only at the outbound wire boundary. - Keeps stored chat history unchanged while making remote request encoding more tolerant of transient duplicate tool-result notices.
## Proxy And MCP Access
- Routes ChatGPT/Codex OAuth token requests and plugin-host HTTP requests through the global proxy configuration. - Keeps plugin redirect, credential-stripping, and SSRF protections intact while adding proxy-aware sessions. - Adds MCP `--access-key` support with Sentra-first environment variables and Osaurus aliases retained for compatibility.
## Access Key Management
- Adds an access-key lifecycle service around generation, label validation, revocation, and stale metadata removal. - Revoking a key now removes visible stale metadata after recording revocation. - UI failures during generation or revocation are reported without leaving stale state behind.
## Verification
- Passed focused provider endpoint, remote request encoding, global proxy, plugin host, access-key lifecycle, and MCP CLI auth tests. - Passed a live app smoke from the Debug build covering provider URL paste handling, temporary access-key generation, MCP key use, revocation, and post-revoke rejection. - Builds the unsigned macOS Debug app for local validation.

# Sentra 1.3.5
## Clawpatch Remediation
- Closes the full Clawpatch queue: 227 findings across security, data-loss, trust-boundary, persistence, lifecycle, user-flow, and test-debt batches. - Hardens MCP, plugin, sandbox, artifact, URL, keychain, storage, migration, memory, schedule, watcher, voice, and release-path behavior with focused regression coverage. - Preserves Sentra identity, bundle identifier, Sparkle feed, storage roots, and legacy compatibility while applying Sentra-native fixes.
## Security And Data Safety
- Fails closed for disabled tools, unsafe paths, unsafe URLs, failed migrations, failed writes, malformed secrets, and destructive reset flows. - Strengthens storage-key, master-key, invite-signature, secret-account, sandbox-install, plugin-runtime, SSRF, symlink, and distributed-control boundaries. - Improves persistence honesty for themes, memory, schedules, watchers, model downloads, release metadata, and local artifact writes.
## Verification
- Runs the full `OsaurusCore` and `OsaurusCLI` test gates on `zion-main`. - Builds the macOS Debug app with signing disabled for local validation. - Launch-smokes the merged `Sentra.app` from DerivedData without replacing `/Applications/Sentra.app`.

# Sentra 1.3.4
## Persistence And Memory
- Restores chat-history and memory-context routing so continuation prompts can recover recent work after closing and reopening Sentra. - Preserves canonical `~/.sentra` state while keeping legacy `~/.osaurus` references compatibility-only. - Adds regression coverage around memory recall, chat-session cleanup, and local persistence drains.
## Agents And Sandbox
- Restores agent avatar color orbs in the sidebar and agent creation flows. - Fixes sandbox Stop so a manual stop remains paused for the current app session instead of being restarted by autonomous agent registration. - Keeps the Auto-Start preference unchanged; explicit Start, Provision, or Reset clears the manual pause.
## Telegram And Tooling
- Stabilizes Telegram plugin trust/configuration checks and read-only connectivity gates. - Hardens CLI launch and audit behavior used by plugin and tool validation paths. - Adds focused coverage for sandbox tool registration, chat sandbox controls, avatar persistence, and CLI app control flows.

# Sentra 1.3.2
## Chat History Preservation
- Fixes a data-root migration issue that could make the left-sidebar chat history disappear after installing an updated Sentra build. - Preserves existing `~/.sentra` chat-history data when legacy `~/.osaurus` data is still present on disk. - Keeps first-run and partial legacy migrations working by still copying missing legacy files forward.
## Reliability
- Allows chat-history database opening to retry if an early launch attempt fails. - Adds regression coverage for canonical chat-history preservation during legacy data migration.

# Sentra 1.3.1
## Identity Refresh
- Updates the Sentra app icon set with the Dark Glass identity direction. - Refreshes the DMG installer background with the new Sentra visual system. - Updates the in-app Sentra mark asset while preserving the existing app identity, bundle identifier, and Sparkle feed.
## Compatibility
- Keeps the `do.net.ai.sentra` bundle identifier and existing user state paths intact. - Ships as a standard Sparkle update over Sentra 1.3.0.

## What's Changed
- Sentra 1.3.0 is available with maintenance fixes and update improvements.

# Sentra 1.2.5
## Telegram And Plugin Updates
- Rebrands the Telegram `/start` greeting from Osaurus to Sentra while keeping the compatible `osaurus.telegram` plugin ID and webhook routes. - Updates the Sentra plugin catalog entry for Telegram to the new plugin artifact version once published through `aidenmi8/sentra-ai`.
## Upstream 0.17.6
- Ports compatible Osaurus `0.17.6` fixes for request validation, schema coercion, provider request encoding, attachment/shared artifact trust boundaries, speech decoding, model performance filtering, and package pins. - Keeps Sentra branding, registry targeting, and unified chat-loop behavior intact.
## Agent Configuration
- Clarifies Quick Actions copy so `Chat` and `Work` are presented as empty-state shortcut groups, not separate runtime modes.

# Sentra 1.2.4
## Telegram Webhook Hotfix
- Fixed plugin URL construction so relay URLs with a trailing slash no longer produce `//plugins/...` webhook URLs. - Normalized incoming HTTP paths so duplicated slashes route to the intended plugin endpoint instead of returning a top-level 404. - Applied the shared plugin URL builder to agent route display/copy URLs, plugin config template expansion, plugin route context, and OAuth/connect routes. - Kept existing plugin IDs and route paths such as `osaurus.telegram` and `/webhook` unchanged for compatibility.
After updating, re-register the Telegram webhook by toggling the bot token or relay/plugin configuration so Telegram receives the corrected single-slash URL.

## What's Changed
- Pointed the Sentra plugin catalog at `https://github.com/aidenmi8/sentra-ai.git` and removed the legacy Osaurus registry fallback. - Cleaned remaining visible Sentra branding in plugin browsing, plugin details, built-in themes, settings copy, and localized strings. - Fixed Insights currency switching so selected currencies update immediately, with a DOP fallback path when public rate providers do not return the currency. - Ported selected upstream Osaurus `0.17.5` fixes: per-model `generation_config.json` sampling defaults, thinking-block routing cleanup, macOS 26 skill editor stability, and the `vmlx-swift-lm` pin update.

## What's Changed
- Updated the Sentra installer background and production update copy so release surfaces no longer show old product branding. - Cleaned the About panel to show a simple version/build line while preserving full release provenance in diagnostics. - Fixed the Tools management view so available tool counts map to visible tool rows. - Refreshed visible Sentra branding for built-in themes, CLI setup copy, onboarding strings, and primary plugin catalog cards.
## What's Changed\n\n- New release of Osaurus v1.2.1
